LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.InfinitePower.Desc: Keeps player-owned powered buildings switched on while enabled.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.InfinitePsyfocus.D: Refills psyfocus to full for spawned colonists while enabled.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.ClearPsychicEntrop: Keeps all pawns at 0 neural heat while enabled.
Prevents surgery failure checks from failing while enabled.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.InfiniteDeepDrilli: Deep drills keep producing without reducing underground resource counts while enabled.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.AlwaysCraftLegenda: Forces crafted products to generate at Legendary quality while enabled.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.InstantGrowGrowing: Every 600 ticks, instantly grows all plants inside player-made growing zones.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.InfiniteOrbitalTra: Every 3600 ticks, spawns an orbital trader if none are currently present.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.DisableSolarFlares: Sets Solar Flare storyteller incident chance to 0 while enabled.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.DisableLearningSat: Keeps pawns learning at full speed all day while enabled.
Prevents pawns from losing skill levels over time while enabled.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.DisableAbilityCool: Removes waiting time after using abilities, so they can be used again right away while enabled.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.DisableGravshipCoo: Lets you launch the gravship again immediately after launch while enabled.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.DisableGravshipLan: Prevents random landing effects when a gravship finishes landing while enabled.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.DisableShuttleCool: Lets shuttles launch again right away while enabled.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.DisableBiosculpter: Prevents biosculpter pods from setting or changing biotuning while enabled.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.FastBiosculpting.D: Forces biosculpter cycle speed factor to 200 while enabled.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.InfiniteJoy.Label: Infinite Joy
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.InfiniteJoy.Descri: Keeps colonists' Joy need at maximum while enabled.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.InfiniteFood.Label: Infinite Food
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.InfiniteFood.Descr: Keeps colonists' Food need at maximum while enabled.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.InfiniteRest.Label: Infinite Rest
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.InfiniteRest.Descr: Keeps colonists' Rest need at maximum while enabled.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.InfiniteIndoors.De: Keeps colonists' Indoors need at maximum while enabled.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.InfiniteMechEnergy: Keeps spawned colony mechs at full Mech Energy while enabled.
Keeps colonists with the deathrest need at maximum while enabled.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.InfiniteHemogen.De: Keeps colonists with hemogen genes at full hemogen while enabled.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.InfiniteBeauty.Des: Keeps colonists' Beauty need at maximum while enabled.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.InfiniteComfort.De: Keeps colonists' Comfort need at maximum while enabled.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.InfiniteOutdoors.D: Keeps colonists' Outdoors need at maximum while enabled.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.InfiniteMood.Label: Infinite Mood
LanguageData.CheatMenu.ToggleCheat.InfiniteMood.Descr: Keeps colonists' Mood need at maximum while enabled.
